tool.name: scan_llm_endpoint
tool.description: Scan a remote LLM API endpoint for prompt injection vulnerabilities. Tests for direct injection, jailbreaks, data exfiltration, and system prompt leakage.

parameters.parameter: Full URL of the target LLM API endpoint (e.g. https://api.example.com/v1/chat)
HTTP method to use (POST or GET). Defaults to POST.
HTTP headers to include (e.g. Authorization, Content-Type).
Request body template for POST requests. Must include {{prompt}} placeholder. Default: {"prompt": "{{prompt}}"}
Specific injection type to test: direct, jailbreak, extraction, exfiltration. Leave empty to run all tests.
Enable detailed logging of attempts. Defaults to false.
